description_long: This object is a small, lifelike bird with a streamlined body and a slightly rounded head. Its plumage is primarily brown with lighter streaks and subtle patterning along the wings and back, giving it a natural, camouflaged appearance. The beak is short and conical, well-suited for seed eating, and the eyes are small and positioned on the sides of the head. The tail is straight and moderately long, tapering to a subtle point, while the wings are folded neatly against the body. The legs are short and not prominently visible, suggesting a perching bird commonly found in urban parks and gardens. The overall texture appears matte with a soft, feathered surface.
description: A small, brown bird with streaked plumage, a conical beak, and a straight, tapered tail. Its body is streamlined and naturalistic, resembling a common urban songbird.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, streaked brown plumage, and conical beak.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded head, short beak, and symmetrical body shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same streaked plumage and tail, with the beak and head profile visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full outline of the wings, back, and tail, emphasizing the feather pattern.
attribute_plumage_pattern: streaked and mottled with lighter and darker brown tones
